analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Exclude BatchJobLauncherAutoConfiguration to prevent automatic job execution at startup, addressing a behavioral change in Spring Boot 4 where the old property to disable this was removed.
Update class-level documentation to explain the rationale for excluding the auto-configuration and the new method for triggering jobs via REST endpoints.
Enforce that the city field is not blank to ensure data integrity.
Add explicit @JsonIgnoreProperties annotation to handle unknown fields from upstream Node service.
Refactor Javadoc to reference the new annotation and clarify the contract with the Node service.
Enforce that the meta field is not null during ingestion.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.human_impl: @NotNull(message = "meta is required (must contain at least city and profile)")

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Update JPA index column list from camelCase to snake_case to align with database schema conventions.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.human_impl: Changed columnList from "measureId" to "measure_id" and "fitScore" to "fit_score".

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Update JPA index column list from camelCase to snake_case to align with database schema conventions.
Update JPA index column lists to use snake_case to match the database schema and Hibernate naming strategy.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.human_impl: Changed columnList values from camelCase (e.g., 'locationKey') to snake_case (e.g., 'location_key') in @Index annotations.

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Update JPA index and unique constraint column mappings to use snake_case names to align with database schema conventions.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.human_impl: Changed columnList and columnNames from "profileKey" to "profile_key" in @Index and @UniqueConstraint annotations.

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Replace regex-based underscore trimming with a linear-time string manipulation method to prevent polynomial ReDoS attacks on user-controlled input.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.human_impl: Replaced `replaceAll("(^_+|_+$)", "")` with a custom `trimUnderscores` method using `charAt` loops.

analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Update the import for AutoConfigureMockMvc to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 4.
Replace the autowired Jackson ObjectMapper with a local instance because Spring Boot 4 (Jackson 3) no longer exposes a com.fasterxml.jackson ObjectMapper bean by default.
analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.human_impl: private final ObjectMapper json = new ObjectMapper();

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from version 3.3.5 to 4.0.6 to align with the new major release.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to match the target JDK.
Explicitly set the PostgreSQL JDBC driver version to 42.7.7 to address a specific CVE regarding insecure authentication fallback.
Add the Spring Boot Flyway starter dependency, which is required in Spring Boot 4 because auto-configuration was moved to a separate module.
Add the Flyway PostgreSQL database driver dependency to support schema migrations for PostgreSQL.
Add the Spring Boot Actuator starter to enable health, info, and metrics endpoints.
Add the Spring Boot Batch starter to support city-wide processing jobs.
Add the WebMVC test starter, required in Spring Boot 4 because test slice infrastructure was modularized.
Add the Data JPA test starter, required in Spring Boot 4 because test slice infrastructure was modularized.
Add the JDBC test starter, required in Spring Boot 4 because test slice infrastructure was modularized.
